mapper.select:
/* selectMcommaList */ select concat(COMPKEY) as ROWKEY , COMPKEY, COUSEYN, CONAMLC, CONAMKO, CONAMEN , COADDR1, COADDR2, COADDR3, COMPLAT, COMPLON , COCIYNM, COREGNM, COTELN1, COTELN2, COTELN3 , COTAXCD, COPOSBX, COPOSCD, COREPNM, COREPTL , COREPEM, COMANNM, COMANTL, COMANEM, COTMZON , FN_COM_TODATE(CREDATE) as CREDATE, FN_COM_TOTIME(CRETIME) as CRETIME, fn_sy_usernam(COMPKEY, CREUSER) as CREUSER , FN_COM_TODATE(LMODATE) as LMODATE, FN_COM_TOTIME(LMOTIME) as LMOTIME, fn_sy_usernam(COMPKEY, LMOUSER) as LMOUSER , UPDTCHK from MCOMMA
and COMPKEY like concat('%' , #{compkey} , '%')
and upper(CONAMLC) like concat('%' , upper(#{conamlc}) , '%')
order by COMPKEY asc
